title: koeleria dactylis
intro: Koeleria dactylis, also known as June grass or prairie June grass, is a perennial grass native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its slender stems and panicles of purplish flowers. Traditionally, Koeleria dactylis has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Koeleria dactylis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or decoction, or used as a tincture or powder in herbal supplements.
